summary: 3D globe visualization project with day/night terminator, twilight zone controls, and time controls showing terminator movement animation.
architectural_notes: UI changes must be surgical — only modify the specific layout area targeted, never alter other layout elements
Time Controls must be placed: below Global Control button, which is below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls
known_issues: Version 1155 broke UI layout and was reverted to v1153; v1153 is the current stable base

existing_features.title: In the left panel of LocationMapExplorer.tsx, insert the TimeControls component directly below the Global Control button section, which itself sits below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls. No other layout elements, ordering, styling, or component positions in the left panel or elsewhere in the UI should be changed from v1153.

Ensure the TimeControls component retains its full original functionality: it must animate and display how the solar terminator moves across the 3D globe at different times of day, including Real, Hourly, and Yearly modes with play/pause controls. Wire up the time state from LocationMapExplorer so the terminator on the InteractiveGlobe updates in response to the time controls.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Time Controls button below Global Control button (below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone), preserving terminator animation functionality showing how terminator moves across 3D globe at different times
